tasks.name: NZ Honey Co | Social Media Pack May
tasks.last_comment: Tiz (client, 2h ago): Any update on the pack?

client_comments.author: Tiz
client_comments.text: Any update on the May social pack? Need to brief the founder by Friday — also can you double-check the captions on posts 3 and 4, they read a bit corporate.

client_comments.author: Tiz
client_comments.text: Looks good on visuals overall. Two requests: (1) swap the hero image on post 1 for the new bottle render, (2) shorten the CTA on the carousel to under 6 words.

tasks.reply_draft: Hi Tiz — finalising the May pack today. We'll send the v2 with the new bottle render and shortened CTAs by 3 pm IST, and tone the post 3 & 4 captions to be warmer. You'll have it before Friday.

tasks.name: Mark J | Blog Post June
tasks.last_comment: Dhruv: Changes done, ready for review

tasks.name: Brand B | Instagram Reels Q2
tasks.last_comment: Sarah (client, 36h ago): Can we add a B-roll cut at 0:12…

client_comments.author: Sarah
client_comments.text: Can we add a B-roll cut at 0:12 of the storefront from yesterday's shoot? Also the lower-third font feels off — please use Syne Bold like we agreed in the brand kit.

tasks.reply_draft: Hi Sarah — good catches. We'll splice the storefront B-roll into 0:12–0:14 and swap the lower-third to Syne Bold. Updated cut will be in your inbox by tomorrow EOD IST.
